programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Builder Kancha Cheena strikes a deal with politicians for the Mumbai parks. As a result, the parks are kept closed and this upsets the kids. Baalveer decides to solve this issue and save the parks.

programme.title: Baal Veer

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: With Baalveer's help, the kids manage to oust Kancha Cheena's men from the park. However, Tauba Tauba overhears the kids and decides to inform Bhayankar Pari about the conflict.

programme.title: Baal Veer

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs Roshan he will be unable to accompany her due to his professional commitments. Later, Madhavi mediates a fight between Roshan and Sodhi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An excited Jethalal calls Sodhi and they talk about Madhavi's dinner invite. Later, Sodhi's childhood friends arrive at the garage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sodhi refuses to throw a party, his friends leave in a huff. Afterwards, he calls Jethalal and confides in him about his problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: To escape the dinner party, Sodhi pretends to have a stomach ache. Shortly after, a worried Anjali gives him some home remedies and refuses to leave his side.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sodhi starts to have intense stomach pains, Chapaklal calls Dr Hathi to get him checked out. But Jethalal is afraid that Dr Hathi would catch Sodhi's lie and the truth would come out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi is sent to Dr Hathi so that he can be examined for his illness. But once he gets there, he tells Dr Hathi that he was faking it to get out of the mess he had landed in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Popatlal cross numerous obstacles and finally succeed in reaching the society gate. Soon, they see Babita and Iyer near Abdul's shop and rush inside in an effort to hide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi's childhood friends go to Bhide's home searching for him. Shortly after, Jethalal calls Sodhi and informs him about what happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Poptalal and Sodhi party with Sodhi's childhood friends. Afterwards, Roshan is furious to learn that the residents of Gokuldham did not inform her about Sodhi's illness.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to convince Roshan to stay at Bhide's house and not to check up on Sodhi. Later, Roshan calls Sodhi and realises that he is lying.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A furious Champaklal chases Jethalal with a stick after learning about his lies. Shortly after, he makes him call Sodhi who admits that he is enjoying himself thoroughly.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan and other Gokuldham residents overhear Sodhi bragging to his friends. Later, Anjali and Babita plead with Roshan to listen to Sodhi's side of the story.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs Roshan that he wanted to party as he met his friends after five years. Later, a furious Roshan threatens to leave him and stay with her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As everything has ended on a good note between Sodhi and Roshan, Gokuldham society members look forward to a new day.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: After analysing the dead bodies of three men, Dr Salunkhe affirms that the killer murders like a wild animal. Later, Team CID uses their wit and the doctor's suggestion to nab the culprit.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Milina, the lead singer of a rock band is shot dead during a concert. Later, Team CID relies on Dr Salunkhe's expertise to pinpoint the exact location the bullet was fired from.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society look forward to the last two prizes. Later, Popatlal is overjoyed as he wins the honeymoon package.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Champaklal about the prizes won by the residents of Gokuldham. Later, Nattu Kaka reveals that Babita got the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita is terrified after having a nightmare about her coupon. Later, Jethalal leaves the house after taking everyone's coupons with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita pleads with Jethalal to have the car delivered the following day. Later, Jethalal reveals that the vehicle cannot be handed over in time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Jethalal stamps the coupons, he realises that the pre-inked porous pad is dry. Later, Jethalal accidentally spills ink on a coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives a certificate of appreciation from Ramsung. Later, Jethalal decides to tell Rustom that he does not possess the car coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha works hard to keep the truth from Babita and Rustom. Meanwhile, the Mahila Mandal excitedly waits for Babita's new car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pakistani officers interrogate Jethalal. Daya and the rest get news of Jethalal being held captive in Pakistan. Taarak calls up Sodhi and comes to know about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and the family pray for Jethalal's return. The Pakistani authorities decide to put Jethalal in jail. Jethalal answers Bollywood-related queries from other inmates.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With no update on Jethalal's status, the BSF officer suggests that everyone return home. However, everyone is infuriated with the idea and refuses to budge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal tries to get out of trouble after agreeing to go on dates with Kalpana and Sapna at the same time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kalpana shows her devotion with a tattoo dedicated to Popatlal. The police grow wary of Popatlal and decide to tail him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kalpana's father decides to meet Popatlal at his house. Sapna's family also agrees to meet him at the same time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the residents of Gokuldham Society prepare for Popatlal and Kalpana's special ceremony. Kalpana and her family enter Popatlal's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the ceremony takes place, a man arrives to meet Pyaarelal. The guests are stunned to learn about Pyaarelal's name change.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal invites everyone to his 'shagun' ceremony with Sapna. Later, Sapna gets a warm welcome to Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal gives Bhide a book. Meanwhile, Jethalal and the residents make preparations for Gudi Padwa in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Madhavi explain to Sonu the importance of Gudi Padwa. Meanwhile, Jethalal and the other residents celebrate the festival.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham Society succeed in collecting a big fund. Later, they all decide to celebrate their success.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The 'Mahila Mandal' is excited about the lunch party. They get together and share some exciting and unforgettable incidents from their lives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar's friend Jignesh arrives in Mumbai with a master plan to teach him a lesson. He approaches Daya with some jewellery sets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The 'Mahila Mandal' decides to purchase jewellery from Sundar's friend Rakesh. The ladies are excited but hide the information from their husbands.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya realises that the necklace is fake and calls up Sundar. She discovers that a stranger has fooled them and shares the information with other ladies of the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The 'Mahila Mandal' comes up with a plan to find Rakesh and trap him. Without informing their husbands, they visit restaurants and try to find information about him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya arrives at the restaurant in a stunning attire and introduces herself as Mona Maheshwari. She doubts one of the waiters and tries to find some leads.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya's plan is perfectly executed and Rakesh arrives to make a deal. He is shocked to see the Mahila Mandal and is arrested by the police.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya reveals how the ladies came up with a plan and got the fake dealer arrested. The Gada family feels proud of Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya calls up Jethalal to tell him she will not be cooking anything. Everyone is curious about the trucks parked outside the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone wonders whose loaded trucks are parked in Gokuldham. Jethalal asks Popatlal to keep his figure for marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Jethalal try to wake up the man they find sleeping under one of the trucks, believing he is the driver.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After seeing Nattu Kaka's name on the truck, everyone suggests Jethalal calls him. However, Nattu Kaka thinks Jethalal calls because he misses him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya investigates the second truck and finds it filled with apples. Jethalal realises superstar Dharmendra is the one who sent the trucks to them as a gift.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Superstar Dharmendra greets the residents of Gokuldham and talks with them about the movies he has appeared in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Chalu Pandey finds boxes of onions in Jethalal's shop, he thinks that Jethalal is selling them illegally and tries to arrest him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's family suffer multiple setbacks when Champaklal goes missing at the train station. A worried Daya seeks help from the media.

programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.
